case_title: MANDEL, BUDER & JACOBSEN VS STORYBOARD EXPRESS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $957.37 FILED BY MANDEL, BUDER & JACOBSEN AS TO DEFENDANT STORYBOARD EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO JOHN DAHLSTROM RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANDEL, BUDER & JACOBSEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STORYBOARD EXPRESS $957.37 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $977.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JAN-28-1993 AS TO THIRD PARTY DAHLSTRUM, JOHN: PRESIDENT STORYBOARD EXPRESS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-08-1993, DISCHARGED AS TO THIRD PARTY DAHLSTRUM, JOHN: PRESIDENT STORYBOARD EXPRESS
